channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: M-Pesa vs Flutterwave vs Paystack: pick the right
item.description: Cut webhook latency 60% and save 3 weeks of dev time choosing between M-Pesa, Flutterwave, and Paystack — real benchmarks, real costs, and the integration mistakes most teams make.

item.title: Pick FastAPI or Django REST: the real trade-offs
item.description: FastAPI beats Django REST in latency by 60% at 25k rpm but costs $8/month less on AWS — real AWS bills, connection leaks, and the unexpected coupling that surprised teams in Nairobi fintech stacks

item.title: Find Node.js memory leaks in 10 min
item.description: Cut Node.js memory leaks in half in 24 hours with heap snapshots and event listener audits — real causes, fixes, and the tooling most teams miss.

item.title: Run LLMs locally today
item.description: s already 80% full when they try to install with LLMs — load, then get a CUDA out-of-memory error when they.

item.title: CircleCI cheaper past 50k builds
item.description: CircleCI cheaper than GitHub Actions at 50k builds? Evidence from three real systems shows when the switch pays off — cache hits, runner size, and self-hosted Spot nodes that cut bills 3×

item.title: Redis vs Memcached: the cache choice
item.description: Cut API latency from 120 ms to 32 ms under 100k QPS by choosing Redis 7.2 over Memcached 1.6.17 — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the production mistakes that break cache.

item.title: Event sourcing: when it’s worth the pain
item.description: Cut audit time from 4 days to 30 minutes with event sourcing — 8ms writes vs 200ms CRUD, but only if you invest in projections and snapshots.

item.title: Split the database now or regret it later
item.description: Cut multi-tenant SaaS database costs by 30% and latency by 60% with schema-per-tenant routing instead of shared schemas. Real systems from Shopify, Stripe and Jakarta startups prove it works.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech (the real reasons)
item.description: akable: - 100% cited unclear promotion paths with Senior devs quit tech — spot the warning signs early, and what you can do a.

item.title: Charge what you're worth: freelance rates
item.description: Learn the real freelance developer rates that paid off in 2024 — actual numbers, spreadsheets, and negotiation scripts that turned proposals into profit for 22 projects totaling $182k revenue

item.title: Land $120k remote: data-driven offers
item.description: Land a $120k remote salary from lower-cost countries using PPP math, rate cards, and phased contracts — benchmarks, scripts, and failure stories included.

item.title: TypeScript strict mode traps: 5 silent failures
item.description: Cut production crashes 60% with strict TypeScript — how zod and custom guards compare, benchmarks, and the mistakes that slip through even with strict mode enabled

item.title: No CS degree? Ship more code
item.description: Ship more production code without a CS degree — real systems, real costs, and the metrics that matter. From Nairobi to Manila, learn how to debug, monitor, and scale without over-engineering or burning cloud cash.

item.title: Pendulum swings back: monolith wins in 2026
item.description: Cut AWS costs 40% and MTTR from 45 to 2 minutes with monoliths in 2026 — build times, real stacks, and the exact tipping point to choose between monolith and microservices.

item.title: Avoid this AI stack mistake before it’s too late
item.description: Cut API latency from 2.1s to 180ms with a boring stack: Postgres + pgvector, Redis, BullMQ, and FastAPI. Real numbers, real code, and the mistakes that break AI-first apps.

item.title: Your AI tools don't improve velocity — here's the proof
item.description: Cut sprint waste by 30% with real AI velocity metrics — cycle time, escaped defects, and CI tests that catch regressions — not PR counts. Learn why story points lie and how to measure impact at any budget tier.

item.title: Skip RabbitMQ when your queue is 10k/sec
item.description: Cut API response time by 60% with Redis Streams — when queues are overkill, what’s the real cost, and which tools to use instead

item.title: Balance client work vs side projects: tools that help
item.description: Balance client work and side projects with ClickUp or Google Calendar. Reduce weekend stress, align deadlines, and improve focus. See which fits your workflow.

item.title: Pool size: most set it wrong
item.description: Cut database p99 latency by 70% by sizing connection pools the wrong way — concurrency limits, churn rates, and idle budgets you’re ignoring. Benchmarks, formulas, and mistakes from real systems.

item.title: Agents get stuck in production too
item.description: Cut agent routing errors by 98% with multi-agent systems — real latency, failure modes, and tool choices from a 1.2M order system. multi-agent systems in production performance numbers tools failure modes
